title: TPC Adapter Params
description: Params for the TPC routing stub adapter. Demand is resolved via PBS stored imps — no SSP endpoint is called.

accountId.description: Publisher account ID on pbs.tpcsrv.com. Required by the Prebid.js tpcBidAdapter; reserved for future server-side account routing.

placementId.description: Stored imp ID. Maps to imp[].ext.prebid.storedrequest.id — PBS loads the stored imp which carries the real bidder config.
